/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -mavx2 -mfma -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/bench_rabitq_accuracy.dir/bench_rabitq_accuracy.cpp.o -o bench_rabitq_accuracy  ../libvdb_index.a ../libvdb_io.a ../libvdb_storage.a ../libvdb_columns.a ../libvdb_codec.a ../_deps/flatbuffers-build/libflatbuffers.a ../libvdb_crc.a ../libvdb_rabitq.a ../libvdb_simd.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgsl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgslcblas.so
